subject: My appointment
body:
Dear Dr Moskowitz
I really appreciate speaking to you on a Saturday ,
As we spoke I have this cough that  I have been suffering from it for over a year it use to be casually occurring but since last summer it occurs immediately after ingesting food or drink 
Please let me know what information you need  and I will furnish it to you by e mail 
I would like to have the procedure on may 8 th if possible 
Yours 
Sultan bin Sulayem  

Sent from my iPhone
body_html:
Dear Dr Moskowitz
I really appreciate speaking to you on a Saturday ,
As we spoke I have this cough that I have been suffering from it for over a year it use to be casually occurring but since last summer it occurs immediately after ingesting food or drink
Please let me know what information you need and I will furnish it to you by e mail
I would like to have the procedure on may 8 th if possible

Sultan bin Sulayem
